We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrator

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	&lrm;Book meetings and schedule events.
	&lrm;Order office stationery and supplies.
	&lrm;Maintain internal databases.
	&lrm;Submit expense reports.
	&lrm;Keep employee records (physical and digital).
	&lrm;Maintain a filing system for data on customers and external partners.
	&lrm;Distribute incoming and outgoing mail.
	&lrm;Prepare regular reports and presentations.
	&lrm;Organize, store and print company documents as needed.
	&lrm;Answer and redirect phone calls.
	&lrm;Make travel arrangements.
	&lrm;Handle queries from managers and employees.
	&lrm;Update office policies and ensure compliance with them.


&lrm;Requirements and skills


	High school diploma; additional qualifications as an Office Administrator or Secretary are a plus.&lrm;
	Proven experience as an Administrator, Administrative Assistant or relevant role.
	&lrm;Familiarity with office equipment, including printers and fax machines.
	&lrm;Knowledge of office policies and procedures.
	&lrm;Experience with office management tools (MS Office software, in particular)
	&lrm;Excellent organizational and time-management skills.
	&lrm;Strong written and oral communication skills.
	&lrm;Problem-solving attitude with an eye for detail.


Salary
N100,000 - N250,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;quadolaadvisoryhrservicesltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Administrator Job at Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited




        
    

        
        Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited is a dynamic Human Resource and Business Advisory firm committed to delivering innovative workforce solutions and strategic consulting services to organizations across various industries. ‎We specialize in helping businesses attract, develop, manage, and retain top talent while improving operational efficiency and organizational performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrator

Job Location: Lagos  
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	‎Book meetings and schedule events.
	‎Order office stationery and supplies.
	‎Maintain internal databases.
	‎Submit expense reports.
	‎Keep employee records (physical and digital).
	‎Maintain a filing system for data on customers and external partners.
	‎Distribute incoming and outgoing mail.
	‎Prepare regular reports and presentations.
	‎Organize, store and print company documents as needed.
	‎Answer and redirect phone calls.
	‎Make travel arrangements.
	‎Handle queries from managers and employees.
	‎Update office policies and ensure compliance with them.


‎Requirements and skills


	High school diploma; additional qualifications as an Office Administrator or Secretary are a plus.‎
	Proven experience as an Administrator, Administrative Assistant or relevant role.
	‎Familiarity with office equipment, including printers and fax machines.
	‎Knowledge of office policies and procedures.
	‎Experience with office management tools (MS Office software, in particular)
	‎Excellent organizational and time-management skills.
	‎Strong written and oral communication skills.
	‎Problem-solving attitude with an eye for detail.


Salary
N100,000 - N250,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "title": "Sales Manager",
  "description": "Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited is a dynamic Human Resource and Business Advisory firm committed to delivering innovative workforce solutions and strategic consulting services to organizations across various industries.&nbsp;&lrm;We specialize in helping businesses attract, develop, manage, and retain top talent while improving operational efficiency and organizational performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Manage the inside sales representatives team
	Set and track sales targets for your team
	Suggest and implement improvements in the sales administration process
	Coordinate department projects to meet deadlines
	Report on sales metrics and suggest improvements
	Prepare monthly, quarterly and annual sales forecasts
	Use customer feedback to generate ideas about new features or products
	Research and discover methods to increase customer engagement
	Ensure sales, finance and legal policies and procedures are met
	Build an open-communication environment for your team
	Liaise with Marketing and Product Development departments to ensure brand consistency and increase sales


Requirements


	BSc Degree in Sales, Business Administration or relevant field
	Proven work experience as an Inside sales manager
	Hands on experience with CRM software and MS Excel
	In-depth understanding of the sales administration process
	Excellent interpersonal and team management skills
	Strong analytical and organizational skills
	Numerical abilities and problem-solving attitude.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;quadolaadvisoryhrservicesltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Sales Manager Job at Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited




        
    

        
        Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited is a dynamic Human Resource and Business Advisory firm committed to delivering innovative workforce solutions and strategic consulting services to organizations across various industries. ‎We specialize in helping businesses attract, develop, manage, and retain top talent while improving operational efficiency and organizational performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage the inside sales representatives team
	Set and track sales targets for your team
	Suggest and implement improvements in the sales administration process
	Coordinate department projects to meet deadlines
	Report on sales metrics and suggest improvements
	Prepare monthly, quarterly and annual sales forecasts
	Use customer feedback to generate ideas about new features or products
	Research and discover methods to increase customer engagement
	Ensure sales, finance and legal policies and procedures are met
	Build an open-communication environment for your team
	Liaise with Marketing and Product Development departments to ensure brand consistency and increase sales


Requirements


	BSc Degree in Sales, Business Administration or relevant field
	Proven work experience as an Inside sales manager
	Hands on experience with CRM software and MS Excel
	In-depth understanding of the sales administration process
	Excellent interpersonal and team management skills
	Strong analytical and organizational skills
	Numerical abilities and problem-solving attitude.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	We are looking for a responsible Personal Assistant to provide personalized secretarial and administrative support in a well-organized and timely manner.

	Produce reports, presentations and briefs

	Up-to-date with latest office gadgets and applications

	Excellent verbal and written communications skills
	Discretion and confidentiality.

Personal Assistant Job at Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited




        
    

        
        ‎Quadri Advisory HR Services Limited is a dynamic Human Resource and Business Advisory firm committed to delivering innovative workforce solutions and strategic consulting services to organizations across various industries. ‎We specialize in helping businesses attract, develop, manage, and retain top talent while improving operational efficiency and organizational performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a responsible Personal Assistant to provide personalized secretarial and administrative support in a well-organized and timely manner.
	You will work on a one-to-one basis on a variety of tasks related to manager’s working life and communication.


Responsibilities


	Act as the point of contact between the manager and internal/external clients
	Screen and direct phone calls and distribute correspondence
	Handle requests and queries appropriately
	Manage diary and schedule meetings and appointments
	Make travel arrangements
	Take dictation and minutes
	Source office supplies
	Produce reports, presentations and briefs
	Devise and maintain office filing system.


Requirements


	High School Degree
	PA Diploma or certification would be considered an advantage
	Proven work experience as a Personal Assistant
	Knowledge of office management systems and procedures
	MS Office and English proficiency
	Outstanding organisational and time management skills
	Up-to-date with latest office gadgets and applications
	Ability to multitask and prioritize daily workload
	Excellent verbal and written communications skills
	Discretion and confidentiality.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Storekeeper",
  "description": "Eta Zuma Mining and Industries Limited provides premium solutions to businesses in the primary and secondary sectors of the economy, especially those in solid minerals, extractive industry, manufacturing industry and agriculture. Some of its clients are Zuma 828 Coal Limited, IMEX Mineral Resources and Processing Company, Zuma Energy Nigeria Limited, Zuma Steel W/A Limited, and Zuma Metals &amp; Energy Resources Limited

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Storekeeper

Job Location:&nbsp;Kogi
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Store Keeper is responsible for the efficient management of the company&rsquo;s store operations, including receiving, storing, issuing, and tracking inventory.
	The role ensures accuracy in stock records, proper documentation, and timely supply of materials to support smooth operational workflow.
	The Store Keeper also maintains a safe and organized store environment while complying with company procedures and audit requirements.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive incoming materials, verify quality and quantity, and update stock records.
	Maintain accurate inventory using stock cards, bin cards, or inventory software.
	Issue materials to departments based on authorized requests.
	Conduct periodic stock counts and reconcile discrepancies.
	Monitor stock levels and report items that need replenishment.
	Ensure proper labeling, safe storage, and easy retrieval of materials.
	Keep the store area clean, well-organized, and secure.
	Prepare and submit daily, weekly, and monthly stock reports.
	Assist in the loading and unloading of goods as required.
	Support audit activities by providing accurate inventory documentation.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Education: SSCE / OND / HND in: Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Inventory/Store Management, Accounting, or any related field


Experience:


	Minimum of 3 years of experience in storekeeping, warehousing, or inventory control.
	Experience with stock management systems is an added advantage.


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong organizational and record?keeping skills
	Basic knowledge of inventory and stock control procedures
	Ability to use Excel or inventory management software
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work with minimal supervision
	Physical ability to handle materials where necessary
	Integrity, reliability, and accountability.

Storekeeper Job at Eta Zuma Mining & Industries Limited




        
    

        
        Eta Zuma Mining and Industries Limited provides premium solutions to businesses in the primary and secondary sectors of the economy, especially those in solid minerals, extractive industry, manufacturing industry and agriculture. Some of its clients are Zuma 828 Coal Limited, IMEX Mineral Resources and Processing Company, Zuma Energy Nigeria Limited, Zuma Steel W/A Limited, and Zuma Metals & Energy Resources Limited

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Storekeeper

Job Location: Kogi
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Store Keeper is responsible for the efficient management of the company’s store operations, including receiving, storing, issuing, and tracking inventory.
	The role ensures accuracy in stock records, proper documentation, and timely supply of materials to support smooth operational workflow.
	The Store Keeper also maintains a safe and organized store environment while complying with company procedures and audit requirements.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive incoming materials, verify quality and quantity, and update stock records.
	Maintain accurate inventory using stock cards, bin cards, or inventory software.
	Issue materials to departments based on authorized requests.
	Conduct periodic stock counts and reconcile discrepancies.
	Monitor stock levels and report items that need replenishment.
	Ensure proper labeling, safe storage, and easy retrieval of materials.
	Keep the store area clean, well-organized, and secure.
	Prepare and submit daily, weekly, and monthly stock reports.
	Assist in the loading and unloading of goods as required.
	Support audit activities by providing accurate inventory documentation.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Education: SSCE / OND / HND in: Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Inventory/Store Management, Accounting, or any related field


Experience:


	Minimum of 3 years of experience in storekeeping, warehousing, or inventory control.
	Experience with stock management systems is an added advantage.


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong organizational and record?keeping skills
	Basic knowledge of inventory and stock control procedures
	Ability to use Excel or inventory management software
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work with minimal supervision
	Physical ability to handle materials where necessary
	Integrity, reliability, and accountability.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Pem Security Guard Network Limited is a fully licensed &amp; insured security company with years of experience in the industry with a mission to provide top-notch security services to our clients, such that their expectation are met and exceeded, while being spotless &amp; professional at it.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant
Job Location:&nbsp;Umuahia, Abia
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Accountant to join our team in the warehousing industry. The ideal candidate will possess a comprehensive understanding of accounting principles and practices, with the ability to apply this knowledge effectively within a dynamic and fast-paced environment.
	As an integral member of our finance department, the Accountant will be responsible for managing financial records, ensuring compliance with established accounting standards, and contributing to the overall financial health of the organization.
	This role requires a strong analytical mindset, exceptional problem-solving skills, and a commitment to accuracy and efficiency.
	The Accountant will work closely with other departments to facilitate the smooth operation of financial processes and to provide valuable insights into financial performance.
	We are looking for an individual who is not only skilled in accounting but also has the ability to communicate complex financial information clearly to non-financial stakeholders.
	If you are passionate about finance and are eager to contribute to the success of a growing warehousing company, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.


Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain financial statements, reports, and records in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP).
	Conduct monthly reconciliations of balance sheet accounts to ensure accuracy of financial data.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable, ensuring timely processing of invoices, payments, and collections.
	Assist in the preparation of annual budgets and forecasts, providing insights into financial trends and performance.
	Support internal and external audits by providing required documentation and explanations of financial processes.
	Implement and maintain accounting controls to ensure the integrity of financial information and compliance with regulations.
	Collaborate with other departments to support financial reporting and analysis efforts.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	Proven experience as an accountant or in a similar role within the warehousing or logistics industry.
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles, regulations, and standards (GAAP).
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel.
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with strong attention to detail.
	Ability to prioritize tasks and manage multiple deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
	Must reside in Umuahia, Abia State.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;careers@pemsecurityservices.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.

Note: For inquiries, call or send a WhatsApp message to:&nbsp;08167388336",

  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Pem Security Guard Network limited"
    
  },

Accountant Job at Pem Security Guard Network Limited




        
    

        
        Pem Security Guard Network Limited is a fully licensed & insured security company with years of experience in the industry with a mission to provide top-notch security services to our clients, such that their expectation are met and exceeded, while being spotless & professional at it.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant
Job Location: Umuahia, Abia
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Accountant to join our team in the warehousing industry. The ideal candidate will possess a comprehensive understanding of accounting principles and practices, with the ability to apply this knowledge effectively within a dynamic and fast-paced environment.
	As an integral member of our finance department, the Accountant will be responsible for managing financial records, ensuring compliance with established accounting standards, and contributing to the overall financial health of the organization.
	This role requires a strong analytical mindset, exceptional problem-solving skills, and a commitment to accuracy and efficiency.
	The Accountant will work closely with other departments to facilitate the smooth operation of financial processes and to provide valuable insights into financial performance.
	We are looking for an individual who is not only skilled in accounting but also has the ability to communicate complex financial information clearly to non-financial stakeholders.
	If you are passionate about finance and are eager to contribute to the success of a growing warehousing company, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.


Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain financial statements, reports, and records in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP).
	Conduct monthly reconciliations of balance sheet accounts to ensure accuracy of financial data.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable, ensuring timely processing of invoices, payments, and collections.
	Assist in the preparation of annual budgets and forecasts, providing insights into financial trends and performance.
	Support internal and external audits by providing required documentation and explanations of financial processes.
	Implement and maintain accounting controls to ensure the integrity of financial information and compliance with regulations.
	Collaborate with other departments to support financial reporting and analysis efforts.


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	Proven experience as an accountant or in a similar role within the warehousing or logistics industry.
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles, regulations, and standards (GAAP).
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel.
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with strong attention to detail.
	Ability to prioritize tasks and manage multiple deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
	Must reside in Umuahia, Abia State.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.

Note: For inquiries, call or send a WhatsApp message to: 08167388336
